name: Fruit of the Forbidden Tree
oracleText:
When Fruit of the Forbidden Tree enters the battlefield, draw a card and you lose 2 life.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice Fruit of the Forbidden Tree: You gain 3 life.
flavorText: "And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food... she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat." — Genesis 3:6
notes: Early World iconic event card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Forbidden fruit.
